description_long: This is a classic wooden nightstand with a rich, reddish-brown finish, featuring two spacious drawers on the front, each adorned with a small round brass knob. The nightstand has a solid rectangular top and stands on four sturdy, slightly tapered legs, which elevate the piece and give it a traditional look. Decorative corner blocks with subtle carved details are present at the top of each leg, adding a touch of elegance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain without any additional ornamentation or hardware. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a smooth, polished surface. This nightstand would typically be found in residential or hospitality settings, but could also serve as a functional accent in urban environments such as lobbies or waiting areas.
description: A traditional wooden nightstand with two drawers, brass knobs, and decorative corner blocks, finished in a rich reddish-brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round brass knobs and decorative corner blocks at the top of each leg.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wood panel with visible grain and the nightstand's rectangular top and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wood panel and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wood panel and visible leg structure.
attribute_leg_design: straight wooden legs with decorative corner blocks
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
